name: Scarlett's Golf Experience
address: 4254 W Riverbend Ave, Post Falls, ID 83854
about: Scarlett's Golf Experience is a virtual golf venue in Post Falls, ID, featuring 11 simulators with HD visuals and ball spin technology across 87 PGA-rated courses. The venue offers a comfortable game room environment with TVs for live sporting events during play, along with a full bar serving beer and wine. Pricing is structured at $40 per hour for up to six people, with booking required for non-operating hours or private parties. The facility also includes a driving range, chipping and putting areas, and plans for professional lessons to begin soon.
why_golfers_like_it: Patented chipping and putting technology for accuracy
Full bar with beer and wine during play
Live sporting events visible while golfing

food_and_drink.notes: No food mentioned, BYOB not indicated
Full bar with beer and wine available

simulator_hardware.notes: Patented technology mentioned but no specific brand identified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs unless otherwise confirmed by contacting the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB is not mentioned, but the venue has a full bar with beer and wine available. Outside food may be restricted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While exact timing isn't specified, most simulator sessions are booked by the hour at $40/hour, so 18 holes would likely take 1-2 hours depending on pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue requires all players to be 21 years and older to play.
